Part.Source:
&SdtHistCliente.FromXml(&Websession.Get('ImprimirHistorico')) loadWWPContext.Call(&Context) If &Context.PesCod = 0 Return EndIf
Do 'Cliente' &PesRaz = &Context.PesRaz For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where FilCod = &Context.FilCod &FilFan = FilFan Exit EndFor
MB 4 MT 2
Header &titulo = 'HISTÓRICO DO CLIENTE' print Cabecalho Print Menu End
If &SdtHistCliente.Count > 0 &TotalValorPago = 0 For &SdtHistClienteItem in &SdtHistCliente
&CreRecPag = &SdtHistClienteItem.CreRecPag &CreCbrCod = &SdtHistClienteItem.CreCbrCod &CbrNom = &SdtHistClienteItem.CreCbrNom &CreDupNro = &SdtHistClienteItem.CreDupNro &CreVlrDup = &SdtHistClienteItem.CreVlrDup &CrePagVlrDsc = &SdtHistClienteItem.CrePagVlrDsc &CrePagVlrJur = &SdtHistClienteItem.CrePagVlrJur &CrePagVlr = &SdtHistClienteItem.CrePagVlr &CreDtaEms = &SdtHistClienteItem.PedDtaFat //DtaFaturado e nao Emissao JDF &CreDtaVct = &SdtHistClienteItem.CreDtaVct &QtdDiasAtrazo = &SdtHistClienteItem.QtdDiaAtz &CrePagDta = &SdtHistClienteItem.CrePagDta &CreVlrSdo = &SdtHistClienteItem.CreVlrSdo &CreVenCod = &SdtHistClienteItem.CreVenCod &CreCod = &SdtHistClienteItem.CreCod &CreDtaCrt = &SdtHistClienteItem.CreDtaCrt &CreDtaPrt = &SdtHistClienteItem.CreDtaPrt &CrePedVlrLiq = &SdtHistClienteItem.CrePedVlrLiq &CrePedCod = &SdtHistClienteItem.CrePedCod
&TotCreVlrSdo += &SdtHistClienteItem.CreVlrSdo &TotCrePagVlr += &SdtHistClienteItem.CrePagVlr &TotCreVlrDup += &SdtHistClienteItem.CreVlrDup &TotCrePagTotItm += &SdtHistClienteItem.CrePagTotItm
// &TotalDuplicataPagaSemValidacao += &SdtHistClienteItem.CrePagTotItm // // if not &SdtHistClienteItem.CrePagDta.IsEmpty() // // &TotalValorPago += &SdtHistClienteItem.CrePagTotItm // &TotalDuplicataPaga += &SdtHistClienteItem.CrePagVlr // // &TotalValorItm += (&SdtHistClienteItem.CrePagVlr - &SdtHistClienteItem.CrePagVlrJur) + &SdtHistClienteItem.CrePagVlrDsc // endif
IF &CreCbrCod <= 0 &AuxCbrCreVlrDup += &SdtHistClienteItem.CrePagTotItm Else &CreCbrNom(&CreCbrCod) = &CbrNom &CbrCreVlrDup(&CreCbrCod) += &SdtHistClienteItem.CrePagTotItm EndIf Print Dados EndFor
EndIf
print Totais print pbResCab
If &AuxCbrCreVlrDup <> 0 print Pb_S_LocCob Endif
For &Pos = 1 to 999 if &CreCbrNom(&Pos) <> '' print pbResDet Endif EndFor
Footer print Rodape End
Sub 'Cliente' For each order EmpCod,PesCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PesCod = &PesCod &PesCidNom = PesCidNom &auxPesRaz = PesCodRaz &PesPrmFon = PesPrmFon &PesCidUfeCod = PesCidUfeCod exit EndFor EndSub

Property.Name: RPT_TEXT
Property.Value: Resumo de Valores por Local de Cobrança

Property.Name: RPT_TEXT
Property.Value: Respeite o meio ambiente. Evite a impressão deste documento!
